season.correction_note: 2026-07-10: 07-09 moon corrected to the board actually bet (Olson/Soto/Rice, 3/3 = +102.81u) vs the mid-slate re-drafted Olson/Soto/Contreras (2/3 = +11.13u). +91.69u restored to moon. A RULES_VERSION/edge-model bump mid-slate force-re-drafted an already-confirmed board; do not re-score a live confirmed slate.
